allow: Bash(sed -i -e 's/--red: #C8102E/--blue: #2563EB/g' -e 's/--red-dark: #A50E26/--blue-dark: #1D4ED8/g' -e 's/--red-light: rgba\(200, 16, 46, 0.08\)/--blue-light: rgba\(37, 99, 235, 0.08\)/g' -e 's/--gold: #C9A84C/--ice: #93C5FD/g' -e 's/--gold-light: rgba\(201, 168, 76, 0.12\)/--ice-light: rgba\(147, 197, 253, 0.12\)/g' -e 's/--dark: #0A0A0A/--dark: #070D1A/g' -e 's/--dark-2: #1A1A1A/--dark-2: #0E1A2E/g' -e 's/--dark-3: #2E2E2E/--dark-3: #1E3A5F/g' css/style.css)
Bash(gh pr create --title 'Build NorthClick freelance portfolio site' --body ' *)

PowerShell(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"\) { "found at Program Files" } elseif \(Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"\) { "found at LocalAppData" } else { "not found" })
